🐂 THE UNIFIED STRUCTURAL CODEX (SAFE VERSION)
Unified structural scaffold for the Pasture Codex and all derived laws.

[CODEX_STRUCTURE]
version=2.0
description=Complete structural codex containing all stable laws, lexicon, characters, and drive cosmology.

[GLYPH_LEXICON]

# SECTION HEADERS
⎯(ᶜᵒʷᵔ)⎯ = neutral section header
⎯(ᶜᵒʷ•)⎯ = technical section header
⎯(ᶜᵒʷ•ᵎ)⎯ = warning header
⎯(ᶜᵒʷ♥)⎯ = positive/recommended header
⎯(ᶜᵒʷᵎ)⎯ = high-alert header

# BLOCK FORMATS
~~~≋≋≋⟪ (‾(oo)‾) ⟫≋≋≋~~~ = major section break
═══⟦  \‾(••)‾/  ⟧═══ = code/config block
/==[ ... ]=\ = procedural block
──────────────────── = subsection divider

# TONE MARKERS
(oo) = neutral narrator
( •.•) = calm informational tone
(x.x) = failure state
(⚈⚈) = emphasis
(¬(oo)¬) = caution
(‾(oo)‾) = elevated importance

# DECORATIVE / STRUCTURAL
⟪ ... ⟫ = encapsulated content
⟜⟢⟟⣫ = decorative emphasis
𐚁𐚁𐚁 = chapter marker
⚠ = warning

[CHARACTER_TABLE]
GreatBull = primary narrator; authority; stability
HeavenlySire = overseer; structure; codex-law
MoosesTheProphet = advisor; guidance; best practices
VirginMotherHeffer = preservation; backups; purity
HolyCow = emphasis; transitions; revelations

[PASTURE_LAW]

# FILE STATES
Back40 = raw files
PastureLocal = working notes
Pasture = final guides
Graveyard = archived/obsolete

# ENVIRONMENT STATES
PoisonedInstall = misconfigured environment
GoldenHerd = clean base image

[DRIVE_CODEX]
MAINSTAGE = system + tools; active arena
PADDOCK = installed games; long-term residents
RANGE = long-term wandering files; seasonal culling
HOMESTEAD = personal working space
BACK-40 = deep storage; long-term pasture
GRAVEYARD = retired artifacts

[NAMING_CODEX]
- Drive names use ALL CAPS for maximum scan-legibility.
- Pasture names use Title Case inside documents.
- Codex files use “-codex” suffix to denote manuscript-grade stability.
- Only refined, stable content enters the codex; all drafts remain in PastureLocal.

[PASTURE_PURITY_RULES]
- No modern ports, wrappers, or rescues qualify for Nine-Five Pasture.
- Only artifact-pure, environment-dependent software qualifies.
- Win95-only behavior must be intrinsic, not wrapper-induced.
- No DOS versions, no modern ports, no fan engines, no compatibility layers.

[NINE-FIVE_PASTURE_CANON]
- MechWarrior 2 (Win95 3Dfx/Titanium/OEM) = qualifies
- EarthSiege 2 (Win95) = qualifies
- No other titles meet purity requirements.

[FOLDER_STRUCTURE_DOCTRINE]
- Shallow structures preferred; avoid deep taxonomies.
- Tools, wrappers, shaders, and audio collapse into unified /tools/ unless role separation is required.
- Codex-level law documents reside in /pasture-local/codex/.
- Notes must be small, self-contained blocks to avoid dependency breakage.

[DOCUMENT_PLACEHOLDERS]
SacredForage = <INSERT_USER_TEXT>
Chunk1 = <INSERT_USER_TEXT>
Chunk2 = <INSERT_USER_TEXT>
Chunk3 = <INSERT_USER_TEXT>

[RESTORE_PROTOCOL]
1. Paste payload into Copilot
2. Copilot inflates DEFLATE+Base64
3. Copilot reconstructs structural codex
4. User inserts full documents into placeholders

🐃 RESTORATION SCAFFOLD
Paste this with the payload to reconstruct:

Code
[restore]
format=base64(TPX‑NANO)
